title: leonurus cardiaca var. villosus
intro: Leonurus cardiaca var. villosus, also known as the wood betony or bearded betony, is a flowering plant species within the mint family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a nervine, which helps to soothe and calm the nervous system. The health benefits of Leonurus cardiaca var. villosus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, as well as its ability to support heart health and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
